auth.title: DAIcer
auth.subtitle: Digital Arcanist Interactive Creative Experience Roleplay
auth.heroDescription: Forge a living campaign with an AI Dungeon Master trained to honour lore, tension, and teamwork.

cards.sectionDescription: Swipe through the pillars that keep every table immersed—lore sync, tactical pacing, and party cohesion.

lore.title: Curated Lore
lore.body: Sync realms, factions, relic histories, and prophecies—the DM remembers every secret.

encounters.title: Adaptive Encounters
encounters.body: Calibrate the danger curve, tone, and pacing with precision narrative controls.

party.title: Party Focus
party.body: Spotlight cooperation, weaving shared glory and combined tactics into every scene.

cta.heading: Gate of Entry
cta.copy: Sign in with your adventuring charter to gather the party in moments.

secondary.title: Beyond the Gate
secondary.subtitle: Keep your table inspired between sessions.
secondary.description: Deliver actionable lore drops, session prep, and player prompts so the next gathering starts at full momentum.

tracks.title: Living Storylines
tracks.body: Surface evolving plot threads and faction agendas so everyone knows which sparks are ready to ignite.

guidance.title: Precision Prep
guidance.body: Turn encounter notes into ready scenes with pacing tips, boxed text, and suggested complications.

readiness.title: Signal Boosts
readiness.body: Share player-facing spotlights, downtime hooks, and inventory reminders to keep the party aligned.

auth.emulatorTip: Any email works in this realm.

dataTable.noResults: No records match the current filters.

generic.prompt: Deterministic dice are locked for diagnostics.
generic.toastErrorDescription: Allow clipboard access and try again.

notFound.title: This route fell off the map
notFound.description: We couldn’t match that path to any shard. Jump back to the citadel and pick another destination.
notFound.helper: Broken routes are logged automatically for keeper review.
notFound.toastDescription: Share this trace with your GM: {path}

error.title: Something misfired internally
error.description: The backend shard for this request tripped an error. Reload and we’ll retry the entire flow.
error.helper: If this repeats, send the incident ID below to support@daicer.dev.

hero.title: Asset Generation
hero.subtitle: Generate images, 3D models, maps, and character sheets for your campaign.

images.title: 2D Images
images.body: Generate character portraits, item icons, and scene illustrations.

models.title: 3D Models
models.body: Create voxel miniatures for creatures, objects, and terrain.

maps.title: Maps
maps.body: Generate battle maps and world locations for your adventures.

characterSheets.title: Character Sheets
characterSheets.body: Create stat blocks for player characters, NPCs, and monsters.

structures.title: Structures
structures.body: Create and manage structures for your world.

characterSheet.title: Your Character Sheets
characterSheet.empty: No characters created yet. Start by creating your first character!

structureBuilder.title: Structure Builder
structureBuilder.subtitle: Create and manage structures for your world
structureBuilder.empty: No structures created yet. Create your first structure!
structureBuilder.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this structure?

game.title: Your Adventures
game.subtitle: All your active campaigns and characters in one place

empty.title: No active campaigns
empty.description: Create or join a room to begin your adventure.

messages.error: Unable to load adventures right now.

goblins.name: 2 Goblins Fight
goblins.description: Quick combat with 2 goblins. Simple DM, straightforward narration.
goblins.worldDescription: You are in a forest clearing. Two goblins block your path.

dragon.name: Dragon Boss Battle
dragon.description: Epic dragon fight. Dramatic DM, verbose storytelling.
dragon.worldDescription: The ancient red dragon Infernius guards a hoard of treasure atop the volcano.

puzzle.name: Puzzle Room
puzzle.description: No combat. Investigation and puzzles. Detailed DM.
puzzle.worldDescription: An ancient chamber with runes, levers, and mysterious symbols. No enemies, just puzzles.

pirate.name: Pirate Adventure
pirate.description: DM speaks like a pirate. Naval combat.
pirate.worldDescription: Ye be sailin' the seven seas, matey. Treasure and adventure await!

success.title: Character sheet created!
success.description: Your asset is ready. Create another or return to the forge.

lobby.title: Lobby
lobby.subtitle: Choose your course
lobby.description: Rally a brand-new table or join a sworn fellowship. The citadel syncs settings, lore, and rosters instantly.
lobby.carouselDescription: Cycle through the key ways to launch a fresh realm, rejoin your party, or open focused sandboxes.

create.title: Create
create.body: Craft a bespoke realm with tone, difficulty, and DM persona tailored to your troupe.

join.title: Join
join.body: Enter an invite code to step back into an ongoing saga—your legend continues.

demo.title: Combat Demo
demo.body: Watch a deterministic battle replay to understand the tactical engine at a glance.

test.title: Dev Test Mode
test.body: Boot the sandbox to iterate on combat, tool calls, and narrative pacing without affecting live tables.

joinHero.heading: Unlock the Sanctum
joinHero.copy: Use the six-rune sigil from your Game Master to step back into the live chronicle.

spellbook.title: Master every incantation
spellbook.description: Preview curated spell lists, slot management, and AI-assisted prep inside the live spellbook.

combat.title: See tactical encounters
combat.description: Watch the turn-based combat engine resolve positioning, dice, and actions in real time.

assets.title: Forge worlds and props
assets.description: Generate maps, minis, lore cards, and reference art with the integrated asset builders.
assets.accent: Map, mini, and lore creation suite

rules.title: Consult the SRD instantly
rules.description: Search, filter, and bookmark 5e SRD entries so your table always has the right ruling on hand.

joinHero.helpText: Only your party can access this room. Codes refresh whenever a new realm is forged.

rooms.title: Your Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Track every table you belong to and jump back into the story instantly.

status.ownerNoCharacter: You have not created a character for this room yet.

empty.title: No rooms yet
empty.description: Create a new adventure or join an existing party to see it listed here.

messages.error: Unable to load rooms right now.

characters.title: Your Characters
characters.subtitle: View all your heroes across different adventures and campaigns.

empty.title: No characters yet
empty.description: Create your first character by joining a game or try the character creator demo.

messages.error: Unable to load characters right now.

hero.description: Shape the realm, calibrate the Dungeon Master, and preview the exact system prompt that will drive your table's legend.

world.description: Select the foundational archetype to seed the realm's tone, mood, and lore baseline.

story.description: Define the campaign's high-level creative pillars. These shape how the AI frames scenes and lore.
story.backgroundPlaceholder: Write the cadence of the realm: ancestral wars, looming prophecies, factions at play...

scope.description: Calibrate the campaign's breadth, pacing, and challenge using linear sliders.

dm.description: Tune the Dungeon Master's cadence, narrative weight, and player engagement. Each slider maps directly to the system prompt.
dm.customDirectivesPlaceholder: List bespoke instructions or table rules the DM must honor.

prompt.title: System Prompt Preview
prompt.caption: This is the exact instruction block sent to the Dungeon Master agent.

errors.incomplete: Please complete all required fields before continuing

history.title: World History Configuration
history.caption: Define the depth and structure of your world's historical timeline.

structures.title: Structure Configuration
structures.caption: Customize the density and types of structures in your world.

terrain.title: Terrain & Road Configuration
terrain.caption: Configure road networks and terrain complexity.

preview.caption: This is the exact instruction block sent to the Dungeon Master agent.

whisper.label: Whisper
whisper.description: Compact phrases; battle reports without flourish.

terse.label: Terse
terse.description: Brief narration with essential sensory beats only.

measured.label: Measured
measured.description: Balanced cadence, short paragraphs anchoring scenes.

storied.label: Storied
storied.description: Narrative flow with hooks and periodic embellishment.

lyrical.label: Lyrical
lyrical.description: Rich language with artful metaphors and cadence.

epic.label: Epic
epic.description: Layered description, foreshadowing, and heroic gravitas.

operatic.label: Operatic
operatic.description: Grandiloquent delivery worthy of bardic sagas.

lean.label: Lean
lean.description: Highlights key props and obstacles, nothing more.

focused.label: Focused
focused.description: Mix of mechanical stakes and vivid landmarks.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.description: Equal parts mechanics, atmosphere, and sensory tone.

textured.label: Textured
textured.description: Layered description of sights, sounds, and culture.

immersive.label: Immersive
immersive.description: Every scene painted with historical and emotional nuance.

cinematic.label: Cinematic
cinematic.description: Panoramic detail, symbolism, and lingering imagery.

observer.label: Observer
observer.description: Relays outcomes; minimal questions to players.

facilitator.label: Facilitator
facilitator.description: Invites input at decision beats only.

guide.label: Guide
guide.description: Regular prompts for intentions and reflections.

provocateur.label: Provocateur
provocateur.description: Pushes dramatic tension, spotlight rotation, character arcs.

immersive.label: Immersive
immersive.description: LARP-like involvement, in-character dialogue, dramatic pacing.

player.label: Player
player.description: Sandbox freedom; react to initiatives more than drive them.

explorer.label: Explorer
explorer.description: Loose threads seeded, players weave them together.

hybrid.label: Hybrid
hybrid.description: Blend of branching choices with gentle nudges.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.description: Story arcs with equal agency and plotted beats.

guided.label: Guided
guided.description: Clear arcs, recurring NPC agendas, purposeful scenes.

plotted.label: Plotted
plotted.description: Strong episodic structure with planned twists.

authored.label: Authored
authored.description: Epic saga with foreshadowed climaxes and dramatic framing.

classic.label: Classic
classic.description: Neutral narrator with modern tabletop etiquette.

courtly.label: Courtly
courtly.description: Highborn formality, heraldic compliments, etiquette cues.

grimdark.label: Grimdark
grimdark.description: Harsh imagery, moral ambiguity, fatalistic tone.

pirate.label: Corsair
pirate.description: Swashbuckling slang, sea shanty flavor, audacious bravado.

shakespearean.label: Shakespearean
shakespearean.description: Elizabethan cadence, poetic turns, dramatic beats.

noir.label: Noir
noir.description: Hardboiled monologue, moody metaphors, smoky intrigue.

storybook.label: Storybook
storybook.description: Fairytale cadence, moral lessons, whimsical wonder.

intimate.label: Intimate
intimate.description: One village, one dungeon, personal stakes.

small.label: Small
small.description: A handful of regions with linked politics.

generating.title: Generating World
generating.subtitle: Creating the history and lore of your realm...

testMode.title: Dev Test Mode
testMode.description: Quick setup for exercising combat, narrative, and tone variations.

terra.label: Verdant Dominion
terra.setting: Verdant kingdoms crowned by ruined keeps
terra.description: Feudal baronies stitched between ancient forests, oathbound knights, and druidic circles guarding secret leyroads.
terra.background: The Crownmarch of Hollowspire weaves rival houses, moss-choked ruins, and ironwood groves together while druids warn of something vast stirring beneath the roots.

water.label: Tidal Sovereignty
water.description: Privateer flotillas, drowned temples, and charts that shift with moon-touched currents.
water.background: Corsair armadas raid imperial convoys as lighthouse enclaves barter with sea witches; legends whisper of a tidal sovereign testing mortals before a coming maelstrom throne.

desert.label: Sunstorm Courts
desert.description: Mirage citadels, djinni-pacted caravans, and sand-song prophets trading in true names.
desert.background: Across the Sable Meridian, astrologer-kings carve palaces into living sandstone while zealots scour for relics buried beneath petrified leviathans.

ice.label: Aurora Vigil
ice.description: Storm-lashed tundras, rune-marked icefields, and silent monasteries guarding shards of a fallen star.
ice.background: Aurora tempests scour the Jotun frontier while frost monasteries honor ancient pacts with glacier spirits; survival hinges on shared fires and remembered lore.

volcanic.label: Ember Supremacy
volcanic.description: Obsidian bastions, salamander forges, and cults singing to the rhythm of a caldera heart.
volcanic.background: War-smith clans harness rivers of fire to fuel siege engines while ash prophets attempt to wake the slumbering titan bound beneath the mountain chain.

forest.label: Whispering Wilds
forest.description: Wyrd flora, seasonal fey courts, and living paths that shift under watchful canopies.
forest.background: Elder trees dream in verdant cathedrals, weaving treaties with mortals; every bargain carries hidden clauses enforced by unseen wardens.

sky.label: Zephyr Ascendancy
sky.description: Sky-knight orders, cloud forges, and storm leviathans patrolling the horizon.
sky.background: Floating archipelagos orbit a shattered moonstone core; zephyr caravans smuggle relics between isles while thunder mages duel for dominion of the upper winds.

underground.label: Umbral Crucible
underground.description: Stalactite cities, tremor cults, and fungus guilds trading memory spores.
underground.background: Gem-lit bazaars cling to cavern ceilings while tremor prophets warn of a colossal burrower nearing the vault; alliances shift faster than cave rivers.

custom.label: Custom Realm
custom.description: Define your own tone, lore, and sigils from the ground up.

character.waitingForPlayers: Waiting for all players to be ready

header.title: The Stage Is Set
header.subtitle: Prepare your character for the journey ahead
header.teamworkBody: When writing your background, consider how your character knows or could connect with the other players in your party. Share common goals, past encounters, or complementary skills. Strong relationships make for better storytelling and more engaging gameplay!

party.title: Adventuring Party
party.waitingForPlayers: Waiting for players to create characters...
party.waitingForAll: Game starts when all players are ready

quickCreate.title: ⚡ Quick Create
quickCreate.description: Load a pre-made character for quick testing

form.backgroundPlaceholder: Write your character's background story here. IMPORTANT: Include how you know or connect with the other party members. Do you share a common goal? Did you meet at a tavern? Are you childhood friends? Strong party bonds make for better adventures!

basics.title: Basics
basics.description: Name your hero and confirm starting level.

quickCreate.title: Quick Create
quickCreate.description: Load a template and customize from there.

race.title: Lineage
race.description: Choose the heritage that shapes your abilities.
race.heading: Choose your lineage
race.copy: Each playable race adds unique features and flavor. Pick the ancestry that suits your story.

attributes.title: Attributes
attributes.description: Allocate point-buy attributes to define your strengths.

class.title: Class
class.description: Identify your role within the party.
class.heading: Select your class
class.copy: Your class defines combat style, power progression, and spotlight moments.

alignment.title: Alignment
alignment.heading: Define your ethos
alignment.copy: Set the moral compass that will guide your hero's decisions.

equipment.title: Equipment
equipment.description: Select your starting gear and equipment.
equipment.heading: Equip your hero
equipment.copy: Choose your starting equipment. Purchase the standard pack for your class or select individual items.

review.title: Review
review.heading: Review your hero
review.copy: Confirm the summary below. You can jump back to any step to refine details.

appearance.descriptionPlaceholder: Add flourish: notable markings, posture, fashion, or other visual details.

portraits.title: Character Portraits
portraits.description: Generate visual references of your hero before finalising the sheet.

errors.backgroundShort: Background story must be at least 50 characters and describe your character relationships
errors.missingPortraits: Generate character portraits before creating your character.

gameplay.actionSubmitted: Action submitted. Waiting for turn to process...

messages.rattling: Rattling the dice tray of destiny...

tactical.dmChatEmpty: Send a command to the DM to start
tactical.dmChatHint: Try: Roll initiative, Fighter attacks Goblin
